title: Results
description: Search official race results and check the latest standings for an event.

discovery.title: Find official results
discovery.description: Search by runner name, bib, or event to open the right results page quickly.

directory.title: Official results directory
directory.description: Browse races with official results already available.
directory.empty: No races with official results match your current filters.

searchResults.title: Search matches
searchResults.description: Official results that match your search.
searchResults.empty: No official matches found for this search.

panel.title: How it works
panel.description: See what makes a result official, how corrections stay visible, and how rankings stay tied to published versions.
panel.point1: Official means the Race Director published that version for the race.
panel.point2: If a correction is approved, we publish the new version without hiding that a change was made.
panel.point3: Rankings use only official published versions and approved corrections.

explainer.title: Why you can trust official results and rankings
explainer.description: Official results are published by the Race Director, corrections stay visible, and rankings use only published official versions.

publishedByDirector.title: Official publication
publishedByDirector.description: A result becomes official only after the Race Director publishes that version for the race.

visibleHistory.title: Correction history
visibleHistory.description: If something changes, the published correction stays visible so you can see that an update happened.

publishedVersionsOnly.title: Published rankings only
publishedVersionsOnly.description: Rankings count only official published versions and approved corrections for that race.

officialMeaning.title: Published by the Race Director
officialMeaning.point1: A result becomes official only when the Race Director publishes it for that edition.
officialMeaning.point2: Draft times, private review data, and unpublished changes do not appear on this public results page.

correctionProcess.title: Visible correction history
correctionProcess.point1: If the Race Director approves a correction to a time, placing, or classification, we publish a new version instead of silently overwriting the old one.
correctionProcess.point2: You can see that a correction happened and when that published version went live.

rankingsRules.title: Rankings use published versions only
rankingsRules.point1: Rankings are calculated only from official published versions and approved corrections.
rankingsRules.point2: When official results from different races clearly belong to the same runner, the ranking may show them together. If something looks off, check the Results page first, then contact support.

corrections.title: Recent corrections
corrections.description: When an official result changes, we show a short summary of what was updated and when.

fallback.noChanges: No detailed field changes were provided.

official.title: {seriesName} {editionLabel} Official results
official.subtitle: This page always shows the latest official or corrected results for this edition.

trustScan.title: Quick check
trustScan.description: Key details about this official results page.

table.title: Latest official results
table.description: Sample rows from the current official results.
table.empty: No results are available yet for this official version.

nonOfficial.description: Official results are not ready for this edition yet.
nonOfficial.noDraftDisclosure: Draft or unofficial data does not appear on this public page.
